nika Grahas - with the
name Gulika etc originate]
From this reference we know that, this effort to know the
rhythm of time and its influence by sub dividing 'Ahoratra'
into Y ama etc is well ancient.
These momentary influences should be considered to rise
at the beginning point of every Y ama. The authentic quote on
the same would be given in the next section. Out of all these
momentary influences here we are interested especially in
Gulika. Because it is one of the influences that helps us in
correcting birth time. The time spot (momentary influence;
Kshenika graha) with the name Gulika discussed here is not
generally used for prediction, but for correcting birth time
only, since it is essentially related to the rhythm of a particular
Ahoratra (the date of child's birth) and not with the whole
natal chart. The rhythm of that date could be important in
determining the correct birth time, but not of much importance
in the broad spectrum of the native's life. This should be kept
in mind.
